protein_name: May be involved in cell migration, cartilage development and in linking signal transduction pathways to the cytoskeleton. May promote apoptosis, via its cleavage by caspase-3. Prostate and placenta. Down regulated in prostate cancer. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: C terminal tensin like; C-terminal tensin-like protein; CTEN; FLJ14950; PP14434; TENS4; tensin 4; Tensin-4; TNS4
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 7.01 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
